name: cybermorph
description: Motion-to-music studio and wearable suit simulator

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @cybermorph/core && npm run dev -w @cybermorph/studio
scripts.dev:desktop: npm run build -w @cybermorph/core && npm run dev -w @cybermorph/desktop
scripts.build: npm run build -w @cybermorph/core && npm run build -w @cybermorph/studio
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build -w @cybermorph/core && npm run build:desktop -w @cybermorph/studio && npm run build -w @cybermorph/desktop
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:desktop && npm run dist:win -w @cybermorph/desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @cybermorph/core && npm run typecheck -w @cybermorph/studio && npm run typecheck -w @cybermorph/desktop
